title: campanula rotundifolia var. re
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. re, also known as Harebell or Bluebell, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. Harebell can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
